doctrine_enforcement_lines: Implementation is not stale by itself. Tickets become stale.
Apply maximum concrete capability within the approved scope of each ticket.
required_planning_gates: structured ADL refs on edges where ADL is used
optional dependency representation as soft / conditional / deferred / manual-review
split-child inheritance or parent-required-dependency exception rationale
sub-surface depth sufficiency / wrapper-ticket risk check
no stale broad sub-surface IDs after deeper split
no seed placeholder copied into ticket fields
